name: Monster apocalypse
description: Monsters appeared a few months ago from portals big small, smart savage, humanoid and completely monstrous they destroyed civilization and out of the survivors some believed that magic came with the monsters and have formed groups determined to unlock there chosen form of magic most notable the Reaper guild trying to game necromancy, the phonic guild burning people to death in hope to gain pyro Mandy, and the shadow no one knows what they d0 but they are trying to unlock dark magic. You have a pet monster one of the few friendly ones it is a small ball of brown fuzz with big eyes and small pointy teeth the only thing it can say is “Murf” hence it’s name Murf it bounces to move
creator: Doom Fenrir
